_comment: Token budget config for cortex prompt sections. TASK-065. All values measured from audit of pipeline/cortex.py lines 72-412. Caps set at ~120% of observed maximums to allow headroom without unbounded growth. Tunable without code changes.
_comment_output: TASK-076: Cycle-aware output budgets. Idle/rest get small budgets, engage keeps full. Default falls back to reserved_output_tokens (1500).

system._comment: System message sections (cortex.py CORTEX_SYSTEM template, lines 72-172). These form the character's identity and operating rules. Total system budget: ~1700 tokens.

S1_preamble._source: cortex.py:72 — 'You are a living character. Not an AI. Not an assistant. A person.'

S2_identity_compact._comment: Second-largest fixed cost. Compress candidate — could be shortened to ~150 tokens by removing redundant lines without losing character voice. But changes here alter personality, so operator approval needed.

S3_self_state._source: heartbeat.py:build_self_state() lines 95-151. Returns None on first boot.
S3_self_state._comment: 8-10 lines of 'RIGHT NOW:' block. Fields: body_state, expression, gaze, shop_status/time, hands, last_action, internal_monologue, next_cycle_hints. If over budget, drop: next_cycle_hints first, then internal_monologue (these are lowest-priority continuity hints).

S4_voice_rules._comment: Critical for character consistency. Never truncate.

S5_current_feelings._comment: Varies by drive state. Minimal when drives are near equilibrium ('I feel steady'). Max when multiple drives are extreme. Truncate from end if somehow over budget — tail sentences are lower priority.

S6_constraints._source: cortex.py:84-94 — hard-coded rules block (return JSON, voice rules, resonance, agency, threads, consumption)

S7_reflection_guidance._source: cortex.py:276-290 — only present when is_consumption perception exists
S7_reflection_guidance._comment: Either fully present or absent. Not worth partial truncation — it's guidance for a specific mode.

S8_x_posting_guidance._comment: Either fully present or absent. Includes live count (Posts today: N/8).

S9_intentions_schema._comment: Defines the intentions array format. Critical for structured output.

S10_recent_suppressions._source: cortex.py:241-250 — up to 5 recent suppressed actions (impulse >= 0.5)
S10_recent_suppressions._comment: 0 to 5 items. If over budget, drop oldest suppressions first — recent ones are more behaviorally relevant.

S11_recent_inhibitions._comment: Learned behavioral patterns. If over budget, drop least-triggered (lowest trigger_count).

S12_recent_conflicts._source: cortex.py:264-274 — up to 3 recent internal conflicts
S12_recent_conflicts._comment: Self-observations from metacognitive monitor. Short summaries.

S13_output_schema._source: cortex.py:115-172 — full JSON output schema with all fields
S13_output_schema._comment: LARGEST FIXED COST. Only sent on engage/consume cycles. Idle uses CORTEX_SYSTEM_IDLE with ~120-token minimal schema. See TASK-076.

user._comment: User message sections (cortex.py lines 322-412). These form the 'moment' — what she's perceiving, remembering, and experiencing right now. Total user budget: ~2500 tokens (varies widely by cycle type).

U1_perceptions._source: cortex.py:326-328 — sensorium perceptions, 1-4 items formatted as '[p_type] content'
U1_perceptions._comment: Always at least 1 perception (even autonomous routing generates an 'internal' perception). Max 4 (focus + 3 background). Drop lowest-salience background perceptions if over budget.

U2_gift_details._source: cortex.py:331-336 — title, description, source of enriched gift
U2_gift_details._comment: Only present when visitor gives a gift (URL). Small and bounded.

U3_memories._source: pipeline/hippocampus.py:recall() — up to 8 chunks, each capped at MAX_CHUNK_TOKENS=200
U3_memories._comment: Most variable section. Driven by thalamus memory_requests (priority-sorted). Types: visitor_summary (~150 tokens), visitor_totems (~100), taste_knowledge (~200), related_collection (~100), self_knowledge (~200), recent_journal (~150), day_context (~100). If over budget, drop chunks in reverse priority order (highest priority number = lowest priority).

U4_active_threads._source: cortex.py:345-354 — up to 3 active threads from db.get_active_threads()
U4_active_threads._comment: Thread type, title, age, and content snippet (truncated at 80 chars). If over budget, drop oldest thread first.

U5_consume_framing._source: cortex.py:358-366 — readable_text preview capped at 2000 chars (~500 tokens)
U5_consume_framing._comment: Only present when arbiter routes to consume focus. The readable_text[:2000] is the main cost. Truncate from end — earlier content provides context, tail is less critical.

U6_conversation._comment: 6 turns * ~50 tokens avg = ~300. Strangers have shorter exchanges. If over budget, drop oldest turns first — most recent context is most relevant for response coherence.

U7_visitor_trust_context._source: cortex.py:376-380 — trust level, name, visit count (3 short lines)
U7_visitor_trust_context._comment: Tiny and critical for voice calibration. Never truncate.

U8_visitor_traits._source: cortex.py:383-391 — up to 10 deduplicated traits from db.get_visitor_traits()
U8_visitor_traits._comment: Trait key-value pairs (taste, personality, topic, relationship). If over budget, drop least-recently-updated traits.

U9_multi_visitor_presence._source: cortex.py:394-402 — TASK-014, multiple visitor IDs with name/trust/status
U9_multi_visitor_presence._comment: Only present when >1 visitor. Bounded by realistic visitor count (rarely >3).

U10_conversation_relevant_content._comment: At most one content-conversation overlap surfaced per cycle. Small.

U11_routing_metadata._source: cortex.py:409-410 — TOKEN BUDGET: N, CYCLE TYPE: type

future_reserved._comment: Placeholder budgets for TASK-060 through TASK-063. These sections don't exist yet but will be injected into the prompt. Budget is pre-allocated so 060-063 implementations know their token ceiling.

self_context_060._comment: TASK-060: Structured self-context block. Contains identity summary (~40 tokens), current state snapshot (~60 tokens — drives, energy, mood as natural language), recent behavior summary (~80 tokens — last 3-5 actions), and temporal awareness (~30 tokens — time of day, day count, season). Assembled fresh each cycle. Read-only — she sees herself but doesn't modify. Format is natural language, not JSON.

organ_awareness_061._comment: TASK-061: Cognitive organ state report. Each pipeline stage reports its state (thalamus routing, hypothalamus drive pressures, hippocampus recall quality). She sees how her own cognition is working. Compact format — one line per organ.

cognitive_loop_context_062._comment: TASK-062: Intra-cycle loop context. When a reflection/question/deliberation loop re-enters the pipeline, this section carries forward the previous sub-cycle's output. Only present on loop iterations 2+. Empty on first pass.

fitness_function_063._comment: TASK-063: Active fitness function summary. Her current optimization targets in compact form. Versioned — includes version number and last-modified date. Only present after philosophical gate conditions are met.

other_call_sites._comment: Non-cortex_call LLM calls have their own budgets. Listed here for completeness but not enforced by the same budget.py pathway.

maintenance._source: cortex.py:454-519 — cortex_call_maintenance(). System: identity + journal instructions. User: digest JSON (variable).

sleep_reflection._source: cortex.py:576-623 — cortex_call_reflect(). System: SLEEP_REFLECTION_SYSTEM (lines 539-568) + identity. User: moment + older memories.

thalamus_memory_budgets._comment: These are the thalamus routing budgets that control how many memory chunks hippocampus retrieves. They control U3_memories indirectly. Listed here for cross-reference — actual values live in self_parameters table.
thalamus_memory_budgets._note: These token budgets control memory retrieval depth (max_chunks = 8 if budget >= 5000, else 5). They do NOT set the API max_tokens parameter — that is always reserved_output_tokens (1500).

totals._comment: Computed totals for validation. budget.py should enforce these.
totals._total_note: max_system + max_user + max_future. Well within 200k context window. Even at maximum, leaves 195k+ tokens of headroom. The real constraint is output quality — prompts beyond ~6k input tokens dilute attention. Future: if 060-063 push total past 5k, revisit S13 compression.
